summary: The PR changes billing sync behavior. One high-confidence issue should be addressed before merge.

findings.title: Deleted users can still update billing records
findings.body: The new billing update runs whenever a customer id exists, but the function no longer checks whether the user has been deleted. That can revive or mutate billing records for deleted accounts.
findings.suggestion: Return before updating billing when `user.deletedAt` is set.
evidence: The added line updates the external customer record without checking deletion state.
